semantic.role: Define the purpose and maintenance boundaries of the .spine/rules directory within the ArchSpine project.
responsibilities: Summarize the role of the .spine/rules directory
Outline the responsibilities associated with this directory
outOfScope: Detailed rule content or implementation specifics

English.purpose: This document provides a high-level summary of the .spine/rules directory, explaining its role in the ArchSpine mirror system and the responsibilities it entails.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and AI agents who need to understand the narrative purpose and maintenance scope of the rules directory without delving into its detailed contents.
key_takeaways: The .spine/rules directory has a defined role within the ArchSpine project.
It carries specific responsibilities that must be maintained.
This summary serves as a quick reference for both human readers and automated agents.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档提供 .spine/rules 目录的高层摘要，说明其在 ArchSpine 镜像系统中的角色以及所承担的责任。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向需要了解规则目录的叙事目的和维护范围的开发者与 AI 代理，无需深入其详细内容即可快速把握要点。
key_takeaways: .spine/rules 目录在 ArchSpine 项目中具有明确的角色定位。
该目录承担特定的责任，需要被妥善维护。
此摘要可作为人类读者和自动化代理的快速参考。
